entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 32
entries.excerpt: After Jacob and Laban had parted, “the angels of God met Jacob” (Gen 32:1). By this they gave Jacob to understand that if Laban had not obeyed God, who had appeared to him in the evening, then on the next morning he and all those with him would have been put to death by the hand of the angels who guard Jacob. For as at his coming the angels accompanying him had been shown to him, so at his return God shows him angels, assuring him of what He had said: “I will go with thee, and I will bring thee thence.…
